title: cassia swartzioides var. scarlatina
intro: Cassia swartzioides var. scarlatina, also known as Scarlet Cassia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly referred to as the legume or pea family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cassia swartzioides var. scarlatina include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to make various remedies for its medicinal properties.
